name: BANT Lead Scorer + Groq AI Router

parameters.content:
## BANT Lead Scorer + Groq AI Router

HOW IT WORKS
Lead fills form → Groq AI scores
via BANT → routes to right channel

HOW TO SET UP
1. Add Groq API key credential
2. Add Slack bot token
3. Add SMTP email credential
4. Set your channel to #sales
5. Hit Publish

CUSTOMIZATION
- Swap Groq model in HTTP node
- Change Slack channel name
- Edit email copy in HTML body
